data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding randomizing hidden slots.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to randomize which slots are hidden to avoid patterns. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of this requirement. The linked use case describes the intended behavior but lacks the necessary evidence to assert that the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps.
gaps: No evidence of an algorithm that randomizes which slots are hidden.
